policy: После значимой реализации добавляйте событие: npm run feed:append (или PR в ecosystem-implementation-feed.json). CI-автозапись — следующий шаг.

items.title: Driver APK download fallback
items.summary: Both APK download entry points now use a shared primary-to-fallback opener, deduplicate URLs and show a controlled Alert when no artifact link can be opened.
stillMissing: Уточнить rollup и validation после CI
items.reasoning: fallbackApkUrl was never used and Linking.openURL rejection could surface as an unhandled promise.
items.apkImpact: OTA-safe download reliability and UX fix

items.title: Driver runtime minimum compatibility
items.summary: minimumRuntimeVersion now uses semver ordering, so newer runtimes satisfy an older minimum; opaque runtime fingerprints retain strict equality fallback.
stillMissing: Уточнить rollup и validation после CI
items.reasoning: Exact string comparison incorrectly required an APK when runtime 1.0.10 was checked against minimum 1.0.9.

items.title: Driver APK fetch cancellation
items.summary: APK manifest requests now always retain the 12-second timeout while also propagating caller cancellation through one internal AbortController with listener and timer cleanup.
stillMissing: Уточнить rollup и validation после CI
items.reasoning: Passing an external AbortSignal previously replaced the timeout signal and could leave a manifest request hanging indefinitely.

items.title: Driver APK cache provenance
items.summary: Update Center now distinguishes fresh in-memory reuse from persistent offline fallback and preserves the original manifest fetch timestamp for stale diagnostics.
stillMissing: Уточнить rollup и validation после CI
items.reasoning: Memory reuse was shown as a network outage, while storage fallback reset lastSuccessAt and made old manifests appear fresh.

items.title: Driver APK native input gate
items.summary: EAS preview now performs a deterministic changed-path preflight and skips full APK builds for OTA-safe sync, status and client TypeScript changes; manual dispatch still forces a build.
stillMissing: Уточнить rollup и validation после CI
items.reasoning: The previous path trigger rebuilt APK 1.0.9 after a test-script-only package change and would rebuild again for release metadata tooling.
items.apkImpact: Prevents redundant APK builds while preserving native and manual release paths

items.title: APK release metadata cleanup
items.summary: Manifest sync now replaces releaseNotes with deterministic metadata for the current FINISHED EAS artifact instead of appending stale build IDs and placeholder text.
stillMissing: Уточнить rollup и validation после CI
items.reasoning: Append-only notes contradicted the real direct APK URL and accumulated obsolete build identifiers on every release.
items.apkImpact: Release metadata only; current APK artifact unchanged

items.title: Driver APK manifest cache isolation
items.summary: Manifest memory and AsyncStorage caches are scoped to the normalized endpoint URL, preventing stale release data from leaking across environments.
stillMissing: Уточнить rollup и validation после CI
items.reasoning: The previous process-wide cache reused a valid manifest for a different configured URL during the 60-second memory window and offline fallback.
items.apkImpact: OTA-safe cache correctness fix; no native rebuild required

items.title: Driver APK manifest contract validation
items.summary: Driver rejects malformed semver, contradictory minimum/latest bounds and unsafe APK URLs before update evaluation; CI covers 7 deterministic cases.
stillMissing: Уточнить rollup и validation после CI
items.reasoning: A malformed release manifest previously degraded to reason=none and could silently hide an APK update.
items.apkImpact: OTA-safe client validation; no native rebuild required
